Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 1 3 08 00 00 to 08 00 10 Temp 20 21 C Pressure 1 bar Vibration 0 Hz Material Flow 0 units s Tool Position 0 mm Energy 0 40 0 50 kWh This looks like idle standby or preparation state Low everything

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 4 6 08 00 15 to 08 00 25 Temp 50 58 C rising Pressure 1 1 5 bar Vibration 30 38 Hz high Material Flow 5 units s steady Tool Position 5 10 mm moving Energy 2 00 3 00 kWh high This looks like cutting or machining High vibration material flow increasing temperature tool moving This could be Cutting Metal or Machining

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events 7 8 08 00 30 to 08 00 35 Temp 40 C dropped from 58 Pressure 2 bar increased Vibration 10 Hz lower than cutting but present Material Flow 2 units s reduced Tool Position 15 mm steady Energy 2 00 kWh This could be assembling or pressing Moderate pressure some flow tool holding position Maybe Assembling Parts or Forming

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 9 08 00 40 Temp 80 C spike Pressure 2 bar Vibration 50 Hz highest Material Flow 0 units s Tool Position 15 mm holding Energy 5 00 kWh peak This looks like welding High temperature spike high vibration no material flow stationary operation tool holding position peak energy This is likely Welding

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Event 10 08 00 45 Temp 30 C dropping Pressure 1 bar Vibration 1 Hz Material Flow 0 units s Tool Position 15 mm Energy 1 00 kWh This could be cooling down or inspection setup Short duration

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events 11 12 08 00 50 to 08 00 55 Temp 25 C stable cooling Pressure 1 bar Vibration 5 Hz low Material Flow 1 unit s Tool Position 20 mm Energy 1 50 1 60 kWh This could be quality inspection or packaging Low vibration low flow tool moved to new position Maybe Quality Inspection since tool position changed to 20mm perhaps a sensor or camera position low energy minimal flow

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
